name: archon-qwen-memoryagent
description: Archon MemoryAgent — an agent with persistent, queryable, cross-session memory built on Qwen (Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope) with a pgvector memory layer, running live on Alibaba Cloud ECS (docker-compose: backend + pgvector container); Function Compute + managed RDS is a drop-in alternative.

scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts tests/unit/consistency.test.ts tests/unit/semantic-consistency.test.ts tests/unit/rerank.test.ts tests/unit/accuracy.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/unit/skills.test.ts tests/unit/mcp.test.ts tests/unit/pnl.test.ts tests/unit/pipeline.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/e2e/cross-session.test.ts tests/e2e/templates.test.ts tests/e2e/http-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/mcp-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/robustness.test.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts tests/unit/consistency.test.ts tests/unit/semantic-consistency.test.ts tests/unit/rerank.test.ts tests/unit/accuracy.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/unit/skills.test.ts tests/unit/mcp.test.ts tests/unit/pnl.test.ts tests/unit/pipeline.test.ts tests/integration/pgvector-store.test.ts tests/integration/pipeline-ingest.test.ts tests/e2e/cross-session.test.ts tests/e2e/templates.test.ts tests/e2e/http-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/mcp-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/robustness.test.ts
scripts.coverage: c8 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts tests/unit/consistency.test.ts tests/unit/semantic-consistency.test.ts tests/unit/rerank.test.ts tests/unit/accuracy.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/unit/skills.test.ts tests/unit/mcp.test.ts tests/unit/pnl.test.ts tests/unit/pipeline.test.ts tests/integration/pgvector-store.test.ts tests/integration/pipeline-ingest.test.ts tests/e2e/cross-session.test.ts tests/e2e/templates.test.ts tests/e2e/http-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/mcp-journeys.test.ts tests/e2e/robustness.test.ts
scripts.coverage:unit: c8 --check-coverage=false node --import tsx --test tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts tests/unit/consistency.test.ts tests/unit/semantic-consistency.test.ts tests/unit/rerank.test.ts tests/unit/accuracy.test.ts tests/unit/server.test.ts tests/unit/skills.test.ts tests/unit/mcp.test.ts tests/unit/pnl.test.ts tests/unit/pipeline.test.ts
